passiveAbilities.name: Giant-Forged Blades
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing or Slicing Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Bodyguard
passiveAbilities.description: If a friendly Noble within 4” and LoS suffers Dmg, you may have this character suffer all that Dmg instead.

passiveAbilities.name: Loyalty
passiveAbilities.description: If this character takes a Reaction Step it may move 3" directly towards the nearest friendly Noble instead of the normal 1" move.

activeAbilities.name: Epic Ballads of Giant Heros!
activeAbilities.description: Other Giants within the pulse gain +1 energy.

signatureMove.name: Shattering Oathstone
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was slain, all other models within 8", excluding friendly Giants and friendly Nobles, suffer 1 Wd. Other friendly Giants and friendly Nobles within 8" restore all Wds instead.
